auth_login_text: Log in to access your account
auth_register_text: Create an account to get started
seo_home_description: SuaReceita — Plan meals, organize recurring recipes, and generate shopping lists for your household.
seo_recipes_description: Browse the administrator-managed recipe catalog and choose meals for your plan.
seo_recipe_detail_description: View ingredients, instructions, servings, and preparation details before adding a recipe to your plan.
seo_planner_description: Build your meal plan, manage recurrence, and organize your household schedule.
seo_planned_meals_description: Review your meal schedule day by day and see each slot mapped across the current planning range.
seo_shopping_list_description: Review the aggregated shopping list generated from your meal plan.
seo_household_description: Manage default servings and planning preferences for your household.
seo_login_description: Log in to your SuaReceita account to manage meal plans, recipes, and shopping lists.
seo_register_description: Create your SuaReceita account and start planning meals for your household.
a11y_shopping_widget_restore: Restore smart shopping progress to the bottom left
home_content_description: Browse curated recipes, repeat household favorites, and turn your plan into a shopping list that is ready to use.
home_preview_description: Preview the flow: pick a recipe, place it in your week, and keep your grocery list updated automatically.
home_feature_recipes_description: Browse administrator-managed recipes with ingredients, instructions, and serving information.
home_feature_recurrence_description: Schedule meals once and repeat them across days, weeks, months, or years.
home_feature_shopping_description: Aggregate ingredients automatically and track what is bought, skipped, or already available.
recipes_subtitle: Browse the catalog and add meals to your plan.
recipes_empty: No recipes match your search yet.
recipe_detail_not_found_description: The selected recipe does not exist in the current mocked catalog.
planner_subtitle: Organize meals, recurrence, and servings for your household.
planner_settings_subtitle: Choose the planning window and defaults before you start assigning meals.
planner_form_subtitle: Add one meal or a recurring series without losing sight of the schedule.
planner_schedule_preview_subtitle: See the upcoming schedule at a glance before opening the full planned meals view.
planner_preview_empty: Add a meal to see your schedule preview here.
planner_create_plan_hint: Start fresh with a clean setup and no meals assigned yet.
planner_range_rule_hint: Meals must stay within {range}. Recurring meals also need an end date or occurrence limit inside this range.
planner_range_pruned: Removed {count} meal entries that no longer fit this plan range.
planner_entry_outside_range_error: Choose a date inside the active plan range before saving this meal.
planner_recurrence_outside_range_error: This recurring meal extends beyond the active plan range. Adjust the date or recurrence limit.
planner_recurrence_needs_limit_error: Recurring meals need an end date or occurrence limit that stays inside the active plan range.
planner_no_entries: No meals added to this plan yet.
planned_meals_subtitle: Map each day to breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks across your active planning range.
planned_meals_empty: Create a plan in the planner to see your day-by-day meal map.
shopping_subtitle: Review ingredient totals and track shopping progress.
shopping_empty: Add meals to your plan to generate a shopping list.
household_subtitle: Configure defaults that make planning faster and more consistent.
seo_profile_history_description: Review previous plans, recurring meal patterns, and recent shopping summaries.
profile_history_subtitle: Track past plans, recurring habits, and shopping outcomes for your household.
auth_login_subtitle: Log in to manage your recipes, plans, and shopping list.
auth_register_subtitle: Create an account to plan meals and organize your household.
auth_forgot_subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth_magic_link_subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to sign in instantly — no password needed.
auth_magic_link_sent: We sent a link to {email}. Check your inbox.
